description: Make runtime attempts to switch to `permissionMode: bypassPermissions` succeed even when the session was NOT launched with --dangerously-skip-permissions (i.e. remove the `isBypassPermissionsModeAvailable` gate at runtime-switch).

patches.search_regex: !X\.getState\(\)\.toolPermissionContext\.isBypassPermissionsModeAvailable\)return\{ok:!1,error:"Cannot set permission mode to bypassPermissions because the session was not launched with --dangerously-skip-permissions"\}
patches.replace: !1&&!1)return{ok:!1,error:"Cannot set permission mode to bypassPermissions because the session was not launched with --dangerously-skip-permissions"}
patches.description: Four separate error sites emit `Cannot set permission mode to bypassPermissions because the session was not launched wit
